calendar.matters:
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Sarah Anne Marshall, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female, and issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Decree signed in open court.
